description_long: This rifle features a classic design reminiscent of the AK-47, with a wooden stock, handguard, and pistol grip, all rendered in a light tan color. The receiver, barrel, and magazine are finished in black, providing a strong visual contrast to the wooden elements. The rifle has a fixed wooden stock at the rear, a curved detachable box magazine, and a standard-length barrel with a simple front sight post. The handguard and grip are ergonomically shaped for comfortable handling. The overall construction suggests a robust and utilitarian firearm, suitable for urban or rugged environments. The surface appears matte with minimal gloss, and the visible components are typical of a traditional assault rifle.
description: A classic-style rifle with a tan wooden stock, handguard, and grip, contrasted by a black receiver, barrel, and curved magazine. The design is robust and utilitarian, with a matte finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the barrel end, front sight post, and a narrow profile of the handguard and stock.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the full length of the rifle, including the wooden stock, handguard, pistol grip, black receiver, and curved magazine.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the end of the wooden stock and the narrow profile of the receiver and barrel.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the same features as the left, with the wooden stock, handguard, grip, black receiver, and magazine visible.
